quienes_title: We offer security, support and continuous maintenance for your systems.
quienes_description: In a much more demanding digital environment, we focus on delivering advanced protection, expert assistance and constant maintenance. This way, your processes are safer, more agile and reliable, with fewer risks and greater productivity for your team.
quienes_securityBody: We protect your company's data with solid technological controls and good digital habits.
quienes_updateBody: We keep your systems up to date so they work with speed, stability and fewer interruptions.
quienes_flexibilityBody: Our support adapts to your company's changes and evolves with your needs.
quienes_serviceBody: Responding quickly to questions and problems improves the customer experience and strengthens your reputation.
servicios_description: From a complete IT team to specific advice, Safeware offers the solution your company needs.
porque_title: At Safeware we apply a different approach to each project.
porque_closing: We share our experience and commitment in every project to build lasting relationships based on trust. We accompany you throughout the entire lifecycle to achieve real results.
porque_reason1_body: We have experts prepared to address your company's challenges.
porque_reason2_body: We act preventively, reviewing and protecting your systems before failures occur.
porque_reason3_body: Every company is different, so we design solutions that grow with your business.
porque_reason4_body: We keep your data and systems protected with secure and reliable solutions.
cta_title: Renew, protect and maximize your business potential.

terminos_section1_p1b: , as well as all services, products, content and functionalities offered through it.
terminos_section1_p2: By accessing, browsing or using our services, you (hereinafter 'the User', 'the Client' or 'you') agree to be bound by these Terms in their entirety. If you do not agree with any part of these Terms, please do not use our services.
terminos_section1_note: These Terms constitute a binding legal agreement between you and PlusBitNova. Please read all sections carefully before contracting our services.
terminos_section2_p1: PlusBitNova offers specialized services in cybersecurity, including but not limited to:
terminos_section2_li1_desc: Comprehensive evaluation of technological infrastructure, including penetration testing, vulnerability analysis and system hardening.
terminos_section2_li2_desc: Implementation of encryption solutions, identity and access management (IAM), and regulatory compliance (GDPR, LFPDPPP).
terminos_section2_li3_desc: SOC (Security Operations Center) services with real-time incident detection and response.
terminos_section2_li4_desc: Awareness and training programs in cybersecurity for work teams.
terminos_section2_li5_desc: Advisory services in security architecture, risk management and business continuity.
terminos_section2_p2: The specific services contracted by the User will be detailed in the corresponding quote or commercial proposal, which is an integral part of these Terms.
terminos_section3_p1: As a User of our services, you commit to:
terminos_section3_li1_desc: Providing truthful, accurate and updated data during registration and contracting of services.
terminos_section3_li2_desc: Using our services ethically and in accordance with the law, refraining from illegal, fraudulent activities or those that could compromise the security of our platforms.
terminos_section3_li3_desc: Maintaining the confidentiality of your access credentials and immediately notifying any unauthorized use of your account.
terminos_section3_li4_desc: Providing necessary access and cooperation for the execution of contracted services, including information, systems and authorized personnel.
terminos_section3_li5_desc: Making corresponding payments within the deadlines established in the quote or invoice.
terminos_section4_p1: All content on this website, including but not limited to texts, graphics, logos, icons, images, audio clips, digital downloads, data compilations and software, is the property of PlusBitNova or its content providers and is protected by applicable intellectual property laws.
terminos_section4_p2: Users may not reproduce, distribute, modify, create derivative works, publicly display, or commercially exploit any content from our site without the express written consent of PlusBitNova. The methodologies, tools and security techniques developed by PlusBitNova are the exclusive intellectual property of the Company.
terminos_section5_p1: PlusBitNova provides its services 'as is' and 'as available'. While we strive to maintain high standards of quality and security, we cannot guarantee that our services are free from errors, interruptions or vulnerabilities.
terminos_section5_disclaimer_text: In no event shall PlusBitNova be liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, special, consequential or punitive damages arising from the use or inability to use our services, even if advised of the possibility of such damages.
terminos_section5_p2: PlusBitNova's total liability to the User for any claim related to our services shall be limited to the total amount paid by the User for services in the last six (6) months. This limitation applies to the fullest extent permitted by applicable law.
terminos_section6_p1: At PlusBitNova, the protection of your personal data is a priority. We collect, process and store your data in accordance with the Federal Law on Protection of Personal Data Held by Private Parties (LFPDPPP) in Mexico and the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) of the European Union when applicable.
terminos_section6_p2: Your data will be used exclusively for the provision of contracted services, billing, customer service and sending communications related to your account. We will not share your personal data with third parties without your express consent, except when required by law or necessary for the provision of services (e.g. payment processors, email platforms).
terminos_section6_p3: You have the right to access, rectify, cancel or oppose the processing of your personal data at any time, by sending a request to gestion@plusbitnova.com. For more information, please consult our
terminos_section7_li1_desc: We accept payments via credit/debit cards (Visa, Mastercard, American Express), bank transfers and cash deposits through our secure payment gateway.
terminos_section7_li2_desc: All prices are in Mexican Pesos (MXN) and include the corresponding VAT (16%). Invoices are issued in CFDI 4.0 format and are sent to the email address provided by the User.
terminos_section7_li3_desc: Services are billed in advance. The User must make payment within the deadlines established in the quote to activate or maintain the contracted services.
terminos_section7_li4_desc: The User may cancel subscribed services with a minimum notice of 15 business days. Payments already made are non-refundable, except in cases of proven breach by PlusBitNova.
terminos_section7_li5_desc: Subscription services will be automatically renewed at the end of each period, unless the User notifies their cancellation with the required notice.
terminos_section8_p1: These Terms are governed and interpreted in accordance with the laws of the United Mexican States. Any dispute arising in connection with these Terms or the services provided by PlusBitNova shall be submitted to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of Mexico City, with the parties waiving any other jurisdiction that may correspond to them.
terminos_section8_p2: If any provision of these Terms is deemed invalid or unenforceable by a competent court, such provision shall be interpreted to the extent permitted by law, and the remainder of the Terms shall remain in full force and effect.
terminos_section9_p1: If you have any questions, comments or concerns about these Terms and Conditions, please do not hesitate to contact us:
terminos_confirmation_text: By using our services, the User confirms that they have read, understood and accept all the terms set forth herein. These Terms may be updated periodically; the most recent version will always be available on this website.
servicio_security_heroSubtitle: Cybersecurity is essential in an increasingly connected world.
servicio_security_heading: Solid digital security for modern businesses
servicio_security_text: We offer cybersecurity solutions designed to protect your company's critical information against digital threats. We implement preventive measures, advanced detection and rapid response to guarantee the integrity, confidentiality and availability of your data.
servicio_security_note: Our service packages include only what is specified in each description:
servicio_security_mcafee_feature1: Protection against viruses, malware, ransomware and spyware.
servicio_security_mcafee_feature2: Includes privacy tools and password management.
servicio_security_mcafee_feature3: Compatible with Windows, macOS, Android and iOS.
servicio_security_kaspersky_feature1: Essential protection against viruses and malware.
servicio_security_kaspersky_feature2: Includes antivirus, firewall and personal data protection.
servicio_security_bitdefender_feature1: Advanced protection against viruses, ransomware and spyware.
servicio_security_bitdefender_feature2: Includes firewall, payment protection and VPN.
servicio_security_bitdefender_feature3: Compatible with Windows, macOS, Android and iOS.
servicio_security_norton_feature1: Protection against viruses, malware and ransomware.
servicio_security_norton_feature2: Includes firewall, password manager and cloud backup.
servicio_security_norton_feature3: Compatible with Windows, macOS, Android and iOS.
servicio_security_totalav_feature1: Real-time protection against viruses, malware and online threats.
servicio_security_totalav_feature2: Includes VPN, browser cleaner and password manager.
servicio_security_totalav_feature3: Compatible with Windows, macOS, Android and iOS.
servicio_remote_heroSubtitle: With our remote and on-site support service, you get expert attention exactly when you need it.
servicio_remote_heading: Your technology secure and optimized with reliable remote and on-site support.
servicio_remote_text: We provide remote and on-site support solutions tailored to your business needs. We handle technical issues, keep your systems in optimal condition and ensure that your technological infrastructure operates in a stable and secure manner.
servicio_remote_service1: Web analysis and development, remote configuration, cPanel or CentOS server support.
servicio_remote_service2: Technical support for Linux and Windows servers.
servicio_remote_service3: Remote phone or virtual support via TeamViewer.
servicio_remote_service4: Remote support for software and hardware.
servicio_remote_service5: Remote technical support via remote connection.
servicio_support_heroSubtitle: Proper managed IT support can solve business problems and move your company forward.
servicio_support_text: We provide specialized support and preventive and corrective maintenance for your applications and systems. We focus on keeping your software updated, secure and efficient, reducing downtime and improving your company's productivity.
servicio_support_note: Our service packages include only what is specified in each description:
servicio_support_service1_desc: For home equipment (browser, antivirus or basic Office)
servicio_support_service2_desc: For 2 users (additional licenses, network configuration extra cost)
servicio_support_service3_desc: Complete update or migration from an old version to a modern one (e.g. Windows 10 → 11; Office 2016 → 2021) with complementary configuration
servicio_support_service4_desc: We solve a simple office application failure (single app, single user)
servicio_support_service5_desc: We solve a more complex application failure (2-4 modules, users, integrations)
servicio_support_service7_desc: For a personal computer / home laptop (individual user)
servicio_support_service8_desc: Small business, 1-2 computers, plus installed software and possible conflicts
servicio_support_service9_desc: With light databases, or critical system requiring performance optimization (configurations, caches, adjustments)
servicio_support_service10_title: Large server / enterprise environments with many applications optimization
servicio_support_service10_desc: High usage, high performance demand, deep optimization of database, network, storage
